name: Hmgene.GitHub.io
body:
### Greetings.
Hello, I am a bioinformaticist studying an evolution of algorithms living in organisms.
Organisms manage their phenotypes in an algorithmic way via genes.
One of important gene types, DNA sequences are to be expressed by some algorithms.
I am a scientist who deduces rules from the experiments interested in RNA processing, transition from DNA to RNA form.
note: Don't delete this file! It's used internally to help with page regeneration.
